title: Saturn Enters the Incident
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Franky, Garp, Sanji, Unknown person #8, Zoro as The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
scene: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hope it will carry us all through the Marine Blockade...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it can only fly within the air field of egghead...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It will fall down as soon as it leaves the air field range of the island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No problem at all! The sunny can take over just before it completely leaves the air field range!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No one would be able to chase us after we fly one kilometer away!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My word! That ship can fly a straight full kilometer?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Very well! Let's go with that plan!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: It's powered by Cola!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Cola?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's a very well thought out plan but we need to disable the frontier dome first before we can escape.

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: You'll never get the password from me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In that case, we will just have to hack it!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Do not underestimate the great Vegapunkj

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lilith! I leave the command of the vegaforce 01 to you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's move the ship to the other side of the labophase!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We need to hurry, the barrier might open any time now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're right! Though disabling it will allow us to escape, but that would mean we will be vulnerable to enemy fire!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Exactly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You know, to tell you the truth...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I have never left this island before!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, we're not going for a picnic you know?.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'll definitely miss the food here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Same here! We won't get to eat any more of it tomorrow, so let's bring some more pizzas!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have cheese on the ship, so don't worry. Sanji can make some for us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see, what a great man! Skilled at cooking and at the same time, strong in battle!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, why did you get in a good mood all of a sudden? So weird...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll admit, I feel better now that I gave up on killing vegapunk...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Good. We won't be annoyed by your crying anymore like last night.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I WASN'T CRYING!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Rob Lucci has made contact!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We now know what's happening inside...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Relay this info to everyone at once!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You heard that, borsalino?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Straw hat was talking Arrogantly to deceive us

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: in believing that he has control over the whole situation...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it doesn't change the fact that they're still cornered like rats.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The frontier dome is a defense system that utilizes lasers, am I right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can't you go through it since you're a light human?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: that might be possible but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The one vegapunk stationed to guard the dome is a friend of mine...

summary: This part advances the Egghead Siege Begins through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
